description: Native app surfaces phase A3b: the creation-dependency gate. A device whose creation needs a system image that isn't installed lands the context SKIPPED with a pointer to `doc-detective install android` — the reference-or-provision device plan runs at preflight, so a missing dependency gates rather than fails. This spec requests an implausibly high Android version (no matching installed image on any runner, including the emulator legs), so it SKIPs everywhere — the asserted creation-gap path.

tests.description: Provisioning form naming a version with no installed system image → SKIPPED (never FAIL), on every host including the KVM emulator legs.
